title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Sanji, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #17 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And... Why is it pitch black?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is the room from before, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: you're going to increasingly "escort" us again...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I will get them to the room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I won't let you leave, little boys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A zombie from inside the painting !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!? The skin rug on the floor...!!
